subcodes.first_line: O children of that compassionate Father! Even as the obdurate Nimrod and the people of Assyria banished that Lord of being and Beauty resplendent from His native land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ابناء آن اب راحم چون نمرود عنود و قوم آشور آن سرور وجود و جمال محبور را از وطن
subcodes.subjects: @Abraham; Isaac; Ishmael, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @power of the Manifestation of God, @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering and imprisonment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
